events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Key call: the evidence given (pre-task setup photos + signed briefing) documents planning controls but not the actual in-progress panelboard makeup work itself, so I flagged `needs_more_info` rather than pass/fail — with specific asks to verify 110.26 working clearance, energization/LOTO status, and Art. 408/200.4 termination compliance during the active work before sign-off.
